name: Frontegg
description: Monitor Frontegg authentication platform for user management and access control compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Frontegg at https://portal.frontegg.com
2. Go to Environments → [your env] → Settings → API Tokens
3. Generate an API token
4. Enter it below

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Frontegg Portal → Environments → Settings → API Tokens

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Frontegg users to audit authentication platform access

checks.name: 2FA
checks.description: Verifies Frontegg MFA is enabled for user authentication security
